## Summary

Describe the proposed feature.

## Use Case

Explain the local configuration diff workflow this would support.

## Scope

Confirm whether this can be implemented without network access, telemetry, write-back, AI features, databases, or a Web UI.

## Alternatives

Describe current workarounds.
